title: Further Education Sector Activity Northern Ireland: 18/19 - 22/23
body: "This statistical bulletin presents a range of analysis regarding enrolments and students (both regulated and non-regulated) in the Northern Ireland further education sector covering academic years 2018/19 to 2022/23. The statistics presented cover the characteristics of those enrolling in FE colleges along with analysis of areas of deprivation, funding streams and performance (retention, achievement and success rates). "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
